records.excerpt: GIT BRAIN The strongest “pressing want” in the framework is not more expansion. It is to become a self-correcting, socially coherent runtime. The docs already give you the route-conditioned nervous system, the DQI compiler, the bounded agent hierarchy, and the replay spine; the explicit unfinished frontier is the next layer where contradiction, quarantine, recovery, and trust revision become a full immune architecture. So the best self-prompt is one that forces the system to optimize for maximum lawful improvement under that pressure: compile the constitutional kernel, turn desire into typed next moves, and build the collective immune layer before chasing further expansion. The framework itself says the next act should maximize immediate benefit, global integration, and future recursive yield under replay and corridor constraints, and that structures are only “real” if they can be born, routed, compressed, expanded, and replayed lawfully.
